element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each character has distinct speed/power tradeoffs (Buzz: strong slow, Ty: fast agile, Kato: balanced quick)
Strategic power burst in ongoing fights
Environmental hazard management alongside opponent combat
Temporary stat boost (increased damage, reduced incoming damage)
Multi-opponent elimination format; 3 knockdowns eliminates player; bonus money reward

element_introduction_order.element: Eight distinct named opponents with unique movesets
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Progressive opponent scaling (Executioner, Southside Jim, Angel, C.C. Rider, Mad Miles, Heavy Metal, Chainman Eddie, Masked Warrior)
Final boss confrontation; mysterious antagonist who taunts between matches
Players must defeat each other to qualify for Championship Match

typical_relief_triggers: Bonus money rewards after Grudge Match victory
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tournament escalation with alternating standard matches and high-stakes Grudge Matches every third fight; tension maintained through environmental hazards and opponent variation; relief occurs through power-ups and successful knockdowns

difficulty_curve.early_game: Standard matches introduce basic combat against initial opponents with straightforward movesets
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Crowd interference escalates; Grudge Matches introduce multi-opponent pressure and elimination mechanics; opponent variety increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Remaining named opponents present higher individual skill challenges; Championship Match against Masked Warrior represents peak difficulty
notable_spikes: Every third match (Grudge Match) requires adaptation to 3-knockout elimination format
Final Championship Match against Masked Warrior (mysterious antagonist with unique threat narrative)
Super NES version difficulty reduction due to removal of interactive audience mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: 1v1 fight against named opponent; punch/kick mechanics; super move available; crowd can interfere with weapons/attacks/pushback; power pills may appear

Every third fight; multi-opponent elimination format (player vs CPU clone solo / player vs other players multiplayer); 3 knockdowns eliminates participant; last player standing wins bonus money; losing does not eliminate player from campaign
Final match (Match 15) against Masked Warrior; mysterious entity who taunts between matches; multiplayer players must first eliminate each other to qualify for this encounter
